name: Healing Passive (daily/monthly income)
description: Recurring income (daily allowance / monthly salary) auto-accrues and feeds the budget calc every session

name: Sound Design + BGM
description: Click/hover SFX and background music heard passively every session; simple to wire up with free assets

name: Healing Potions (side income)
description: Preset (50/100/250/1000) or custom one-off income add for side-hustle earnings, reuses existing form pattern

name: Achievements
description: Passive tracking each session (no-spend streaks, HP thresholds) with unlock storage and notification UI

name: Player Character with Equipment
description: Character sprite gains/loses shields and weapons tied to HP; needs multiple equipment-tier states/assets

name: Animated Boss
description: Monster animation escalates with damage taken; multiple animation states, cosmetic only

name: Weekly/Monthly/Yearly Reports + Comparison Tool
description: Period-aggregated reports and a period-vs-period comparison view; checked roughly weekly, not daily
